items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival🅰️🅰️ CABAS ANAIS Grained calfskin handbag 👜 Small. CE latest tote bag, a different kind of tote.
Especially high-end, exquisite, lazy vintage style, simple and not flashy. Simply too practical; grained calfskin is completely worry-free against scratches 🫶🏻 Perfect for careless besties~ Sides can be adjusted, easily fits a laptop 📒 or daily essentials.
Features one main compartment
One interior flat pocket
Two long leather handles
With long shoulder strap
Style No.: 118613
Color: Yellow-brown
Size: 20.5 (opening 35) x 9 x 19cm
💰:

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TRIOMPHE Kelly Handbag👜
New Triomphe Clutch, Full of High-end Feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram color scheme, etc... all exude incomparable high-end feel❤️ Kelly's classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all showing aesthetic charm🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113 Grey Color
Dimensions: 20.5x13x8 (Comes with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival AA
When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter runway, the mirror-like pieces are sure to catch the eye 👁️ Clean, elegant lines, minimalist design and silhouette interplay. If you can only choose one piece, you must choose this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant, patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, perfect for hand or shoulder carry ❇️
TRIOMPHE snap closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.: 118313
Color: Black
Size: 21x5.5x11cm

【Premium Hardware Genuine Leather】Wander Matelasse Sheepskin Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Caramel Sheepskin
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse sheepskin, featuring exquisite craftsmanship that creates a three-dimensional effect, showcasing refined elegance. Featuring a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of modern femininity.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
Code:_5BC125

items.name_en: Large 40cm (Black) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25C Bucket Drawstring Bag! A new little cutie added to the Chanel series, deer suede. Its body is actually a small bucket bag, the leather is soft matte suede 🐂 Can fit some cute mini earphone cases 🎧, looks like a carefully curated outfit. Large Double C logo design, can be adjusted! Charming details, ⛓ chain is non-adjustable, vintage gold hardware, has a strong vintage vibe 👅 Can't help but praise this piece ✨ Style: 99921 Size: 30x 26x 14
